texto: Fighting with siblings, especially the little ones, has always, and will always be the same. You fight with your hands tied behind your back. You know that you'll lose. But you still fight back, either you want to annoy them or let them feel the extra satisfaction of beating you after a long fight. No matter which of the two ways you take, it clearly shows that you love them. A lot.
explicacao: Citação de Nishanth Anchan K.N. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Fighting with siblings, especially the little ones, has always, and will always be the same. You …” articula amor, annoy, fight em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como fight e kids.
